title: paeonia corallina subsp. russoi
intro: Paeonia corallina subsp. russoi is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Paeonia corallina plant, belonging to the Paeoniaceae family, also known as the peony family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and improving digestion and sleep quality. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
